description: A single-line text input used in chat or messaging screens. Consists of a pill-shaped text field and a circular send button. The send button changes appearance when the user begins typing.

parts.description: Outer container that holds the input pill and send button. Carries the surface background, padding, and gap.
Pill-shaped text field. Shows placeholder text when empty; shows typed text and a cursor when active. Border changes color in the Typing state.
Circular button with an up-arrow icon (Customer-Icon/up-top). Appears as a secondary button in Default state; fills with dark background in Typing state.

states.name: Default
states.description: Empty input. Placeholder text visible. Input pill has a light border. Send button uses secondary (ghost) style.

states.name: Typing
states.description: User is actively typing. Text and cursor visible. Input pill border turns dark. Send button fills with dark background, icon turns light.

behavior.sendTrigger: TODO: Confirm — tap send button and/or Enter key
behavior.clearOnSend: TODO: Confirm — whether input clears after send

realWorldUsage.context: In-ride chat screens between rider and driver.
Chat screen for driver to message a rider. Placeholder: 'Message Jhon...'

notes: The send button is a sub-component using the Button/only icon pattern from components/core/actions/button-icon.
The send button icon is Customer-Icon/up-top at 20×20px.
Wrapper surface token: --surface/neutral/sunken — confirmed same between DS Core and product apps.
Driver App token uses --surface/neutral/bg-sunken (with 'bg-') while DS Core uses --surface/neutral/sunken. Same value, different token name — flag for alignment.
The input pill layer is named 'chat imput' (sic) in Figma — intentional or typo in the DS Core file.
